design_note: Cost behaviour rules, discretionary spend heuristics, and spend quadrant definitions are internal platform design choices. No external benchmark is claimed for these classification rules. Addressability percentages (fixed: 0%, semi-variable: 60%, variable: 100%) are internal defaults; override at the category level using regulatory_exclusions.json and contract-specific data.

essential.description: Mandatory, non-discretionary spend — cannot be cut without regulatory or operational breach

strategic.description: Core to delivering the company's products or services — reducing threatens revenue or competitive position

supportive.description: Enables operations but is not core to revenue generation — optimization improves margins

discretionary.description: Can be reduced or eliminated short-term without immediate operational impact
